author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Include the vendored kit license**

When slice 1 follows this skeleton, it copies the MIT-licensed kit as only `bootstrap.py`, while the text earlier relies on the upstream LICENSE staying in the kit tree. That means the gift repo would contain a copied/substantial portion of the kit without the license/notice alongside it, especially if it is shared with the friend as a private collaborator repo. Add the kit LICENSE/NOTICE to the skeleton or vendor location so the copied bootstrap remains license-compliant.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
